parents.subject: LU-20084 osp: fix LDLM ns kobject leak in lwp_device_fini()

commit.subject: LU-20084 osp: drop redundant NULL check before free_prior()
commit.message:
LU-20084 osp: drop redundant NULL check before free_prior()

ldlm_namespace_free_prior() already handles ns == NULL internally,
so the explicit obd_namespace check is unnecessary.

Suggested-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Hiroshi Nishida <hnishida@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I19f1ae35eb60b792744b6018fa49be6ec89969ed
